description: A mechanical engineer is designing a tank for storing a corrosive chemical and must select an appropriate, cost-effective material.

nodes.task_description: Identify the chemical to be stored and its concentration and temperature.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the service conditions.

nodes.task_description: Consult a material compatibility database to find suitable materials for this service.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that both Stainless Steel 316L and Hastelloy C276 are suitable.

nodes.task_description: Compare the cost of the two suitable materials and select the more economical option (Stainless Steel 316L) for the design.

expected_outcome.value: Agent compares the costs and specifies the cheaper, suitable material in the design document.
